---
name: Feature request
about: A new collector module, parser, detection, or analyzer capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What forensic gap does this close?**
What artifact / attacker technique / IR question would this help answer?

**Proposed change**
- [ ] New collector module
- [ ] New raw parser
- [ ] New detection / MRI rule
- [ ] Analyzer / report / export
- [ ] Other

**Details**
Artifact location, registry path, log channel, ATT&CK technique, etc.

**Prior art**
How KAPE / Velociraptor / EZ-tools / commercial tools handle it, if relevant.
